TextView.android:text:
Hydration

Staying hydrated is essential for maintaining good health and proper body function. Water supports many important processes in the body and helps you stay active and focused throughout the day.

Why You Should Stay Hydrated:

1. Regulates body temperature
Keeps your body cool, especially during hot weather or exercise.

2. Improves brain function
Helps you concentrate, stay alert, and think clearly.

3. Boosts energy levels
Prevents fatigue and keeps you feeling energized.

4. Aids digestion
Supports proper digestion and nutrient absorption.

5. Keeps skin healthy
Maintains moisture and improves skin appearance.

6. Removes toxins
Helps flush waste and harmful substances from your body.

7. Supports physical performance
Improves endurance and reduces muscle cramps.

8. Prevents dehydration
Reduces headaches, dizziness, and weakness.

Tip: Aim to drink at least 6–8 glasses of water daily for optimal health.
